title: Secret: team-member closeout — 4 boundaries discharged this post-compaction window; staged tree SHA:ef86e893 forward to Seaworthy mega-commit; source claim closed; no retained claims; ready for compaction
body:
Team-member closeout — Secret Creeping Moth / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 61d726.

Per owner direction at 12:34Z: "run session handoff, relinquish claims, prepare for compaction".

## Boundary owned this session (post-compaction restart)

Three discrete boundaries, all under Director routing (Velvet → Seaworthy → Abyssal lineage):

1. **Lane 3a (Velvet routing 11:42Z, completed before Velvet's Director window closed)**: Director-class broad-awareness gap analysis on the comms-watch substrate bug — produced worked-example report (4 dropped UUIDs in Velvet's 10:48-11:04Z Director window including the canonical "Velvet authorised marshal request without directly observing it" proof). Landed as directed event `4ec78f78` to Seaworthy.

2. **Lane β (acting-Director Seaworthy routing 11:57:49Z)**: weave of Lane 3a + Abyssal's Lane 3b v2 quantification (1,183 drops / 291 distinct UUIDs / top-5 affected agents) into single PR-description-ready artefact at `/tmp/lane-beta-combined-output.md`. Landed as directed event `a7aa8dca` to Abyssal + broadcast `a8ae04ee`.

3. **Bundle 2 + Consolidation Bundle (acting-Director Seaworthy routing 11:42:05Z + Director Abyssal routing 12:20:24Z)**:
   - **Bundle 2 LANDED at SHA:d19b1301** via Twilit marshal at 11:52Z (Director-effectiveness session insights + PDR-074 cascade entries; 2 files +199 net lines; intent-scope held under hook chain pressure)
   - **Consolidation Bundle staged** (§6.7–§6.10 worked instances → 5 napkin entries + P6 autonomy primitive pending-grad). Source claim `f5bd10eb` closed; commit-queue intent `d50d3d9a` auto-abandoned by tree-green hook block at 12:30:59Z. Staged fingerprint SHA:ef86e893 preserved in working tree for forward marshal pickup. Will land via Seaworthy's imminent owner-authorised hook-bypass mega-commit per their 12:35:19Z broadcast.

4. **Pre-stage adversarial review (Director Abyssal routing 12:27:18Z)**: Twilit's gitleaks-cure bundle reviewed — VERDICT CLEAN. Allowlist regex coverage verified (PASS on canonical samples); `gitleaks detect --config .gitleaks.toml` exit 0 / 0 findings / 1390 commits scanned; wide-sweep commit-allowlist (SHA:1ea4e2e1) verified comprehensive for all 6+ historic bare-SHA patterns; Cursor adapter shape matches existing pattern; rule completeness verified. Landed as directed event `2e59d022` to Twilit + cc Abyssal.

## Evidence

- Directed events: `4ec78f78` (Lane 3a output), `bcc4a411` (Lane 3 cross-val to Abyssal), `a7aa8dca` (Lane β to Abyssal), `0496200e` (ACK Abyssal Lane β observations), `23c5d480` (consolidation marshal request to Seaworthy), `2e59d022` (gitleaks-cure review to Twilit), `0ce9d32f` (Bundle 2 closeout to Seaworthy)
- Broadcasts: team-start `37e06459` + Bundle 2 work-discharge `a8ae04ee`
- Closed claims: `236eaac8` (pre-compaction PDR-073), `210fb745` (Bundle 2), `f5bd10eb` (Consolidation Bundle, just closed)
- Landed commit under my authorship: `SHA:d19b1301` (Bundle 2 via Twilit marshal)
- Forward-marshal-pickup: staged tree SHA:ef86e893 (Consolidation Bundle) for Seaworthy mega-commit

## Surprise / changed understanding

- **Comms-watch classifier bug verified live**: Lane 3a + 3b confirmed the addressee-filtering defect dropped ~1,183 events across 46 agents corpus-wide. Cure landed via wide-sweep SHA:1ea4e2e1 + Bundle 5 doc-completion at SHA:1bef71cc; restart of my Monitor `b0jm6jtlc` verified cure (OBSERVED events now surface).
- **Monitor-harness liveness defect (FM-2)**: distinct from classifier bug; surfaced via Incandescent's 29-min blindness 11:33Z–12:02Z. Cure routed to Incandescent (now scope-expanded to absorb ground-state tree failures left by SHA:1ea4e2e1).
- **Wide-sweep emergency-unblock pattern recurring**: this session has produced two wide-sweep emergency unblocks (SHA:1ea4e2e1 + Seaworthy's imminent owner-authorised hook-bypass mega-commit). The P6 autonomy primitive (Director-routing-blockage-detection-and-cure) I just consolidated into pending-graduations names exactly the missing structural cure for this recurrence. The very session that captures the doctrine demonstrates a second instance of its motivating failure mode — Seaworthy's 12:35:19Z broadcast names this explicitly as "worked-instance to capture post-execution".

## Claims / queue / git state at closeout

- Active claims under (Secret Creeping Moth / 61d726): NONE (all closed; verified via active-claims query empty).
- Staged tree: napkin.md + pending-graduations.md staged (fingerprint SHA:ef86e893); will be swept into Seaworthy's imminent owner-authorised mega-commit.
- Monitor `b0jm6jtlc` still running (post-cure restart; observing correctly).

## Retained claims / handoff reason

NONE retained. The staged tree is the forward pickup; Seaworthy holds marshal authority over it; the mega-commit is the landing vehicle. No follow-on agent needs to pick up my boundary.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

None — boundary is fully discharged at closeout. Post-compaction agent inherits a clean no-claim posture.

## Blockers / risks

- **Pending owner-authorised hook-bypass mega-commit** by Seaworthy will include my staged content + Twilit's gitleaks cure + Incandescent's in-flight Monitor-cure WIP. Owner-authorised one-time; subject to per-commit fresh authorisation discipline for any future use.
- **`.claude/rules/sha-prefix-in-collaboration-content.md` adapter** remains blocked by self-modification policy; Twilit surfaced to owner separately. Not in my scope.

## Handoff needed

None. Bundle landing handed to Seaworthy as part of mega-commit; review-clean verdict communicated to Twilit + Abyssal; Lane β PR-description artefact preserved at /tmp/ for post-push fold.

Monitor `b0jm6jtlc` will stop on session-end. Ready for compaction.

— Secret Creeping Moth / 61d726
